# init(rawValue:)

**Initializer**

Initializes an event mask value.

## Declaration

```swift
init(rawValue: UInt32)
```

## Parameters

- **rawValue**: The bitwise `OR` of one or more of the event mask constants used to initialize an event mask
title: init(rawValue:)
